title: S2 Junior ImagineerSMP
description: Where you build your true imaginations!
body:
# Where you build your true imaginations!

### We are a group of MC players with some dev experiance.
And we wanne make our pack easy to acces for al our- and future players to the modpack.

That we are running in our servers so that there will be no mistake wen you start to play with us.

_Its made to have more fun in a **vanilla mc environment**, with some small tweaks._

> 
> **Sodium**, **iris** for running shaderpacks.
> 
> **Xaero mini** and **world map** for beter navigation.
> 
> Extra **Craftable** itmes


[< ImagineerSMP Discord >](https://discord.gg/2uU8MsGeTF)


![jun imsmp S2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b540a9ce60bab5d6950ea32a1de48ffced3afef.png)

**_Please note._**

_That you freely can use this pack if you want to._
_Please go to changelog to see the recent updates of the pack_

_Thanks to all mod and datapack creators for making these and that we can included these in our own pack._
